untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of complex candlestick patterns (doji gap down followed by gap up white candle) and multi-bar trend sequences. While individual components like doji detection (small body_pct) and gap detection (close > prev_high) can be approximated, the full pattern recognition requires sequential bar analysis and explicit gap + doji + reversal logic not supported by simple indicator comparisons. The regime 'SHORT_TERM_REVERSAL' is also non-standard.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: entry uses small body (doji proxy), gap lower (close < prev_close), then gap higher (close > prev_high). However, proper Bullish Abandoned Baby requires explicit doji detection on bar N-1 and white candle on bar N within a head-and-shoulders context—these require pattern recognition beyond indicator thresholds. Exit uses reversal below prior low as conservative stop. Recommend implementing as custom pattern detector rather than indicator rules.
